goal: Close all open branches from v3 through disciplined terminal decisions, then attempt weak-window targeted repair on the immutable base before considering any higher-friction exploration.
global_constraints: active-signal-v1@1 is immutable reference — never modify the base snapshot.
Previously rejected branches (H1_post_funding_long, H2_expiry_lead_lag, A1_high_iv_long_v1, A1b_high_iv_momentum, A4_wed_afternoon) must not be reopened.
Static high-IV regime is a volatility mode, not a directional signal — do not reinterpret as alpha.
Every hypothesis branch must reach a terminal decision (promoted or rejected) before the plan can advance past its wave.
Medium-friction wave is locked until low-friction wave is fully exhausted with recorded final verdict and no promoted candidate.
Maximum 2 weak pockets may be selected for specialist repair.
Separate data tasks from research results — never conflate them.

stages.title: Полный closure-audit по прошлым планам
stages.objective: Open a new v4 research project and compile a unified register of all unresolved items from prior plan cycles.
actions: Open a new research_project for v4.
Record the closure-audit as a research_record.
Fix the immutable reference (active-signal-v1@1).
Define research_map axes for the v4 program.
Compile a unified open-items register of all outstanding debts.
success_criteria: The immutable reference is formally recorded in the project.

stages.title: Формально закрыть все незавершенные документы и memory-nodes прошлых планов
stages.objective: Eliminate all organizational debt by giving every hanging branch from previous plans a terminal status before new research begins.
actions: Create a terminal result node for v3 branch A1.
Verify that all previously rejected branches have terminal nodes (H1, H2, A1b, A4).
Create a research_record: v3_final_report summarizing all v3 outcomes.
Update registry statuses for every branch.
Confirm no branch remains without a terminal node.
success_criteria: No branch in research memory lacks a terminal status (promoted or rejected).

stages.title: Полностью закрыть ветку A2_iv_acceleration
stages.objective: Drive the primary unfinished branch A2 from v3 to a definitive terminal decision through the full feature-to-backtest chain.
actions: Define the feature contract for iv_delta_1h (custom feature specification).
Materialize the feature dataset.
Run plausibility checks on a base-absent surface.
Build strict standalone prototypes (A2_v2 and A2_v3 variants).
Run the full acceptance chain: standalone backtest → stability analysis → integration test.
success_criteria: A2 has a terminal decision: promoted or rejected with documented reason.

stages.title: Полностью закрыть A3_broader_cl_transition (только если A2 не promoted)
stages.objective: Only if A2 was not promoted, bring the backup branch A3 to a terminal decision so no half-alive branches remain.
actions: Define transition feature contract for broader CL transition signals.
Group transitions by economic meaning.
Run plausibility checks on base-absent surface.
Build strict prototypes for selected transition groups.
Run full acceptance chain: standalone backtest → stability → integration.
success_criteria: A3 has a terminal decision: promoted or rejected with documented reason.
stages.gate_hint: Execute only if A2_iv_acceleration was NOT promoted in stage_3. If A2 was promoted, formally skip this stage with a research_record noting A3 is unnecessary.

stages.title: Общий вердикт по low-friction wave
stages.objective: Produce a single binding final verdict on whether the low-friction candidate space has been exhausted.
actions: Compare all surviving candidates (A2, optionally A3) against the immutable base.
Classify each candidate as mainline quality, specialist watchlist, or reject.
Accept exactly one of three outcomes: (a) a candidate is promoted, (b) no candidate promoted but watchlist recorded, or (c) low-friction space exhausted with nothing to promote.
Record the final low-friction verdict as a research_record.
success_criteria: A single, unambiguous low_friction_final verdict is recorded.

stages.title: Weak-window repair specialists
stages.objective: Determine whether targeted specialist features can repair the weakest performance pockets of the immutable base.
actions: Build a weakness atlas of the immutable base (identify worst-performing time windows and conditional pockets).
Select at most 2 weak pockets from the atlas.
For each weak pocket, formulate one specialist hypothesis targeting that pocket.
For each specialist, execute a shortened but honest acceptance chain: feature contract → standalone backtest → stability check.
success_criteria: Answer recorded: can targeted repair produce anything useful beyond the base, or is the base already optimal within low-friction scope?

stages.title: Решение по medium-friction wave
stages.objective: Decide whether to unlock medium-friction exploration (B1: cross-symbol leadership, B2: model-backed IV-routing) only after all lower-friction work is conclusively finished.
actions: Verify all unlock conditions simultaneously: A2 terminal decision recorded, A3 closed or formally skipped, low-friction final verdict recorded, weak-window repair program completed, and no promoted candidate exists.
If unlock is granted: scope and begin B1 (cross-symbol leadership) and B2 (model-backed IV-routing/compression) branches.
If unlock is denied: record the decision and rationale.
success_criteria: A clear lock or unlock decision for medium-friction wave is recorded with rationale.
stages.gate_hint: Unlock requires ALL of: (1) A2 has terminal decision, (2) A3 closed or formally skipped, (3) low-friction final verdict recorded, (4) weak-window repair program completed, (5) no promoted candidate. If any promoted candidate exists from earlier stages, this stage is skipped entirely.

stages.title: Финальный отчет по v4
stages.objective: Write a comprehensive final report for the entire v4 research cycle, summarizing all decisions, terminal outcomes, and next-step recommendations.
actions: Compile all terminal decisions from stages 2–7 into a single coherent narrative.
Record the v4 final report as a research_record.
Update the research_map with final axis positions.
If any promoted candidate exists, document the path to integration.
If nothing was promoted, document the rationale and recommended next cycle direction.
success_criteria: A complete v4 final report is recorded in research memory with all terminal decisions, verdicts, and forward recommendations.

warnings: Plan source is in Russian; stage titles and objectives are translated/paraphrased.
Stage 3 raw markdown references sub-steps (feature contract, materialization, plausibility, prototypes, acceptance chain) but actions_hint is empty — sub-steps were inferred from section titles.
Stage 8 has no explicit objective or success criteria in source; inferred from raw_markdown context.
